positive: Minimalist abstract geometric depiction of a crescent moon emerging from a stylized nebula cloud. The composition must feature a strong central silhouette with deep negative space, emphasizing high contrast between the glowing moon and the dark background. Use bioluminescent teal, deep indigo, and soft lavender color palette. Vector art style, clean linework, perfect symmetry, designed for screen printing, highly scalable, sticker art aesthetic, isolated on white background or solid color background.
